meaning: n.笑剧;v.模仿;Multipurpose Internet Mail Extension protocol,多用途的网际邮件扩充协议
examples: The performance consisted of dance, music and mime.
We communicated mainly by signs, gesticulation, and mime.
And in the next scene, four of the actors mime the rhythmic making of Afghan flatbread.
Peking Opera, also known as Jingju, is a form of traditional Chinese theatre which combines music, vocal performance, mime, dance and acrobatics.
